entry.title: [INDO SUB] NCT OSHIETE JAPAN! EP 2 LESSON 2

link.title: [INDO SUB] NCT OSHIETE JAPAN! EP 2 LESSON 2

entry.content:
Everything belongs to NCT 127, I just translated it into Indonesian.
ENGSUB from : Neo Subs For NCT
INDO SUB by : @Sweetyzen_
Ini salah satu variety show NCT 127 yang wajib ditonton. Aku translate ini karena belum ada sub indo nya. Jadi maaf jika ada kalimat yang salah atau tidak dimengerti. Keep support NCT & WayV!
entry.summary: Everything belongs to NCT 127, I just translated it into Indonesian. ENGSUB from : Neo Subs For NCT INDO SUB by : @Sweetyzen_ Ini salah satu variety show NCT 127 yang wajib ditonton. Aku translate ini karena belum ada sub indo nya. Jadi maaf jika ada kalimat yang salah atau tidak dimengerti. Keep support NCT & WayV!

entry.title: Lyon : un fourgon attaqué devant la Banque de France par 5 individus armés

link.title: Lyon : un fourgon attaqué devant la Banque de France par 5 individus armés

entry.content: Un fourgon contenant 9 millions d’euros a été attaqué par cinq individus armés devant un bâtiment de la Banque de France dans le VIIe arrondissement de Lyon.
entry.summary: Un fourgon contenant 9 millions d’euros a été attaqué par cinq individus armés devant un bâtiment de la Banque de France dans le VIIe arrondissement de Lyon.

entry.title: Tourisme : les bureaux de change dans la tourmente

link.title: Tourisme : les bureaux de change dans la tourmente

entry.content:
Les professionnels du tourisme font face à des difficultés, et notamment dans les bureaux de change. Ils sont très fortement impactés par l’absence de visiteurs étrangers.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

link.title: PBA Kamustahan Ep. 11 Part 3

entry.content:

entry.title: Les vacanciers face à une entrée compliquée - 29 08

link.title: Les vacanciers face à une entrée compliquée - 29 08

entry.content:
Les vacances touchent à leur fin. Dans les campings, les vacanciers profitent jusqu’au bout de leurs derniers moments de détente. Certains parents s’inquiètent la rentrée scolaire prévue mardi prochain. Leurs enfants sont en effet trop petits et ne peuvent pas porter de masque. D’autres sont cependant sereins, car ils ont appris aux enfants à faire attention et à désinfecter les mains. - C’est votre week-end, du samedi 29 août 2020, sur BFMTV.
"C’est votre week-end" sur BFMTV, samedi et dimanche à 7h45. Un invité répond aux questions de Sandra Gandouin et Benjamin Dubois pour mieux comprendre votre quotidien et vous donner les meilleurs conseils pour profiter au mieux de votre week-end.
BFMTV, 1ère chaine d’information en continu de France, vous propose toute l’info en temps réel avec 18h d’antenne live par jour et plus de 1000 duplex par mois. Retrouvez BFMTV sur le canal 15 de la TNT et sur BFMTV.com.
entry.summary: Les vacances touchent à leur fin. Dans les campings, les vacanciers profitent jusqu’au bout de leurs derniers moments de détente. Certains parents s’inquiètent la rentrée scolaire prévue mardi prochain. Leurs enfants sont en effet trop petits et ne peuvent pas porter de masque. D’autres sont cependant sereins, car ils ont appris aux enfants à faire attention et à désinfecter les mains. - C’est votre week-end, du samedi 29 août 2020, sur BFMTV. "C’est votre week-end" sur BFMTV, samedi et dimanche à 7h45. Un invité répond aux questions de Sandra Gandouin et Benjamin Dubois pour mieux comprendre votre quotidien et vous donner les meilleurs conseils pour profiter au mieux de votre week-end. BFMTV, 1ère chaine d’information en continu de France, vous propose toute l’info en temps réel avec 18h d’antenne live par jour et plus de 1000 duplex par mois. Retrouvez BFMTV sur le canal 15 de la TNT et sur BFMTV.com.

entry.title: Building material company takes on staff to run new South Shields branch after rival closes its doors

link.title: Building material company takes on staff to run new South Shields branch after rival closes its doors

entry.content: Dove Building Materials will open in Throckley Way on the Middlefields Industrial Estate, South Shields, on Tuesday, September 1, with the help of six workers previously employed by Travis Perkins.
entry.summary: Dove Building Materials will open in Throckley Way on the Middlefields Industrial Estate, South Shields, on Tuesday, September 1, with the help of six workers previously employed by Travis Perkins.

entry.title: Philippe Myers gives Flyers Game 2 win in overtime

link.title: Philippe Myers gives Flyers Game 2 win in overtime

entry.content: Philadelphia Flyers defenseman Philippe Myers fires a shot that deflects off a stick and past Semyon Varlamov early in overtime to give the Flyers the 4-3 victory over the New York Islanders in Game 2 of the 2nd Round
entry.summary: Philadelphia Flyers defenseman Philippe Myers fires a shot that deflects off a stick and past Semyon Varlamov early in overtime to give the Flyers the 4-3 victory over the New York Islanders in Game 2 of the 2nd Round

entry.title: Belarus deports several foreign journalists covering protests

link.title: Belarus deports several foreign journalists covering protests

entry.content: The Associated Press said two of its journalists have been deported as scores of other foreign media reporters had their accreditations withdrawn. View on euronews
entry.summary: The Associated Press said two of its journalists have been deported as scores of other foreign media reporters had their accreditations withdrawn. View on euronews

entry.title: Modi Government बना रही लिस्ट!, भ्रष्ट और अयोग्य Employees की होगी छुट्टी वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Modi Government बना रही लिस्ट!, भ्रष्ट और अयोग्य Employees की होगी छुट्टी वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The central government has instructed all ministries and departments to maintain a register of government servants in the 50-55 year age bracket, and those who have completed 30 years in service, as it plans toweed out more “corrupt” and “inefficient” officials, ThePrint has learnt.Watch video,
भ्रष्ट सरकारी अधिकारी और कर्मचारियों के खिलाफ अब मोदी सरकार एक्शन में है. इसलिए अब मोदी सरकार अब भ्रष्ट और अयोग्य सरकारी कर्मचारियों पर नकेल कसने की तैयारी कर रही है. जिसको लेकर पूरा खाका तैयार किया जा रहा है. इसको लेकर मोदी सरकार ने ऐसे सरकारी कर्मचारियों की पहचान करने के निर्देश भी दे दिए हैं. पूरी जानकारी के लिए ये वीडियो देखें
#ModiGovernment #Corruption
entry.summary: The central government has instructed all ministries and departments to maintain a register of government servants in the 50-55 year age bracket, and those who have completed 30 years in service, as it plans toweed out more “corrupt” and “inefficient” officials, ThePrint has learnt.Watch video, भ्रष्ट सरकारी अधिकारी और कर्मचारियों के खिलाफ अब मोदी सरकार एक्शन में है. इसलिए अब मोदी सरकार अब भ्रष्ट और अयोग्य सरकारी कर्मचारियों पर नकेल कसने की तैयारी कर रही है. जिसको लेकर पूरा खाका तैयार किया जा रहा है. इसको लेकर मोदी सरकार ने ऐसे सरकारी कर्मचारियों की पहचान करने के निर्देश भी दे दिए हैं. पूरी जानकारी के लिए ये वीडियो देखें #ModiGovernment #Corruption

entry.title: The Essentials for Hosting an Outdoor Gathering

link.title: The Essentials for Hosting an Outdoor Gathering

entry.content: Summer outdoor gathering may look a bit different this year, but we’re still all looking for ways to get gather outside with our friends and family. Here are some of our tips and must-haves to do it right.
entry.summary: Summer outdoor gathering may look a bit different this year, but we’re still all looking for ways to get gather outside with our friends and family. Here are some of our tips and must-haves to do it right.

entry.title: एसटीएफ ने मेरठ में पकड़ी NCERT की 35 करोड़ रुपए की नकली किताबें

link.title: एसटीएफ ने मेरठ में पकड़ी NCERT की 35 करोड़ रुपए की नकली किताबें

entry.content: मेरठ। उत्तर प्रदेश के मेरठ जिले में आर्मी इंटेलिजेंस की सूचना पर यूपी स्पेशल टास्क फोर्स (एसटीएफ) और स्थानीय पुलिस की संयुक्त टीम थाना परतापुर क्षेत्र के एक गोदाम में छापा मारा। छापे में पुलिस और एसटीएफ को करीब 35 करोड़ रुपए की एनसीईआरटी की नकली किताबे और छह प्रिटिंग मशीन बरामद की है। पुलिस ने मौके से करीब 12 लोगों को गिरफ्तार किया है। मेरठ के एसएसपी अजय साहनी ने पूरे मामले की जानकारी दी है।
entry.summary: मेरठ। उत्तर प्रदेश के मेरठ जिले में आर्मी इंटेलिजेंस की सूचना पर यूपी स्पेशल टास्क फोर्स (एसटीएफ) और स्थानीय पुलिस की संयुक्त टीम थाना परतापुर क्षेत्र के एक गोदाम में छापा मारा। छापे में पुलिस और एसटीएफ को करीब 35 करोड़ रुपए की एनसीईआरटी की नकली किताबे और छह प्रिटिंग मशीन बरामद की है। पुलिस ने मौके से करीब 12 लोगों को गिरफ्तार किया है। मेरठ के एसएसपी अजय साहनी ने पूरे मामले की जानकारी दी है।

entry.title: PM: Country must continue to develop

link.title: PM: Country must continue to develop

entry.content:
Malaysia must overcome challenges to become a developed nation whose successes can be enjoyed by all its rakyat, says Tan Sri Muhyiddin Yassin.
The Prime Minister said that in his National Day address on Sunday and pledged to make ‘Prihatin Rakyat’ (Caring for the People) as the main guiding principle of the government that has been translated in the hitherto-announced economic stimulus packages.
WATCH MORE:
SUBSCRIBE:
LIKE:
entry.summary: Malaysia must overcome challenges to become a developed nation whose successes can be enjoyed by all its rakyat, says Tan Sri Muhyiddin Yassin. The Prime Minister said that in his National Day address on Sunday and pledged to make ‘Prihatin Rakyat’ (Caring for the People) as the main guiding principle of the government that has been translated in the hitherto-announced economic stimulus packages. WATCH MORE: SUBSCRIBE: LIKE:

entry.content: Cristiano Giuntoli confirmó que tras una reunión con Raiola se llegó al acuerdo de que Hirving se mantenga en el club
entry.summary: Cristiano Giuntoli confirmó que tras una reunión con Raiola se llegó al acuerdo de que Hirving se mantenga en el club

entry.title: 15 Top Tourist Places in Bhutan - 2020

link.title: 15 Top Tourist Places in Bhutan - 2020

entry.content:
Best tourist places to visit in Bhutan :
1. Rinpung Dzong - A hamlet town full of monasteries with serenity of Buddhism is located right in the heart of Bhutan. The place is perfect for your sightseeing in Bhutan
2. Punakha suspension bridge - This longest suspension bridge of Bhutan is one of the oldest suspension bridges in the world, Punakha Suspension Bridge in Bhutan was believed to be built by the Buddhist Monk, Thangtong Gyalp.
3. Phobjikha Valley - A valley in the shape of a bowl at 3000 mts. is one of the best places to visit in Bhutan. The valley is also known as Gangteng Valley.
4. Drukgyel Dzong - Ruins of the greatest monastery ever will take you centuries back while you get enchanted by the pure serenity surrounding this place.
5. Chomolhari - An enchanting reward for trekkers. Hike for a few hours and you will reach this magnificent place.
6. National Museum of Bhutan - Established in the year 1968, the National Museum of Bhutan in Ta Dzong at Paro is home to more than 3000 masterpieces and artworks..
7. Tiger’s Nest - A place for Buddha’s meditation.Tiger’s Nest is the most popular and best place to see in Bhutan. A half day trek will take you to this very famous spot where Buddha himself sat for years and meditated.
8. Tashichho Dzong - Largest landmark of Thimphu that stands tall two kilometers away from the main town. It is the main secretariat building which houses the offices of the King and the throne room
9. Motithang Takin Preserve - This national reserve is the home to the national animal of Bhutan.
10. Zuri Dzong - One of the oldest built forts, this ancient fortress dates back to 1352 and is home to the valley’s local protector. This is among the best places to visit in Bhutan.
11. Haa valley - This obscurely beautiful valley will give you numerous options to backpack. All you have to do is pack your bags and explore this lush green valley and try traditional Balaneese cuisine.
12. Buddha Dordenma Statue - Do visit this 169 ft tall statue of Lord Buddha, as it will leave you speechless.
13. Chele La Pass - this pass is home to Jomolhari Mountain at 13000 ft. Take your ride over this pass to get mesmerised by the breathtaking views.
14. Dochula Pass - Can you imagine a high altitude mountain pass with 108 Chortens and Stupas? Dochu La most definitely offers this, so do not miss this magnificent mountain pass on your list as it offers perfect sightseeing tour of Bhutan
15. Simply Bhutan - Visit this fantastic museum to witness the true bhutanese culture and get immersed in the vibrant feel of this place. The ticket to museum won’t burn a hole in your pocket either.
Thanks for watching!
entry.summary: Best tourist places to visit in Bhutan : 1. Rinpung Dzong - A hamlet town full of monasteries with serenity of Buddhism is located right in the heart of Bhutan. The place is perfect for your sightseeing in Bhutan 2. Punakha suspension bridge - This longest suspension bridge of Bhutan is one of the oldest suspension bridges in the world, Punakha Suspension Bridge in Bhutan was believed to be built by the Buddhist Monk, Thangtong Gyalp. 3. Phobjikha Valley - A valley in the shape of a bowl at 3000 mts. is one of the best places to visit in Bhutan. The valley is also known as Gangteng Valley. 4. Drukgyel Dzong - Ruins of the greatest monastery ever will take you centuries back while you get enchanted by the pure serenity surrounding this place. 5. Chomolhari - An enchanting reward for trekkers. Hike for a few hours and you will reach this magnificent place. 6. National Museum of Bhutan - Established in the year 1968, the National Museum of Bhutan in Ta Dzong at Paro is home to more than 3000 masterpieces and artworks.. 7. Tiger’s Nest - A place for Buddha’s meditation.Tiger’s Nest is the most popular and best place to see in Bhutan. A half day trek will take you to this very famous spot where Buddha himself sat for years and meditated. 8. Tashichho Dzong - Largest landmark of Thimphu that stands tall two kilometers away from the main town. It is the main secretariat building which houses the offices of the King and the throne room 9. Motithang Takin Preserve - This national reserve is the home to the national animal of Bhutan. 10. Zuri Dzong - One of the oldest built forts, this ancient fortress dates back to 1352 and is home to the valley’s local protector. This is among the best places to visit in Bhutan. 11. Haa valley - This obscurely beautiful valley will give you numerous options to backpack. All you have to do is pack your bags and explore this lush green valley and try traditional Balaneese cuisine. 12. Buddha Dordenma Statue - Do visit this 169 ft tall statue of Lord Buddha, as it will leave you speechless. 13. Chele La Pass - this pass is home to Jomolhari Mountain at 13000 ft. Take your ride over this pass to get mesmerised by the breathtaking views. 14. Dochula Pass - Can you imagine a high altitude mountain pass with 108 Chortens and Stupas? Dochu La most definitely offers this, so do not miss this magnificent mountain pass on your list as it offers perfect sightseeing tour of Bhutan 15. Simply Bhutan - Visit this fantastic museum to witness the true bhutanese culture and get immersed in the vibrant feel of this place. The ticket to museum won’t burn a hole in your pocket either. Thanks for watching!

entry.title: शर्मनाकः छेड़खानी के आरोप में पुलिस ने तीन लड़कों को दी तालिबानी सजा

link.title: शर्मनाकः छेड़खानी के आरोप में पुलिस ने तीन लड़कों को दी तालिबानी सजा

entry.content: समस्तीपुर। बिहार के समस्तीपुर जिले में पुलिस की बेरहमी का मामला सामने आया है, जहां छेड़छाड़ के आरोप में तीन युवकों को बांधकर उनकी बेरहमी से पिटाई कर दी। इस घटना का वीडियो सोशल मीडिया पर तेजी से वायरल हो रहा है। पुरा मामला जिले के बिथान थाना क्षेत्र के पुसहो गांव का है। पुसहो पंचायत के मुखिया के बतरडीहा गया स्थित घर पर छेड़खानी के आरोप में तीन युवकों को लाया गया फिर मुखिया पति कैलाश राय और बिथान थाना के एसआई अवधेश सिंह ने बेरहमी से उन तीनों युवकों को पीटा।
entry.summary: समस्तीपुर। बिहार के समस्तीपुर जिले में पुलिस की बेरहमी का मामला सामने आया है, जहां छेड़छाड़ के आरोप में तीन युवकों को बांधकर उनकी बेरहमी से पिटाई कर दी। इस घटना का वीडियो सोशल मीडिया पर तेजी से वायरल हो रहा है। पुरा मामला जिले के बिथान थाना क्षेत्र के पुसहो गांव का है। पुसहो पंचायत के मुखिया के बतरडीहा गया स्थित घर पर छेड़खानी के आरोप में तीन युवकों को लाया गया फिर मुखिया पति कैलाश राय और बिथान थाना के एसआई अवधेश सिंह ने बेरहमी से उन तीनों युवकों को पीटा।

entry.title: AP Schools Reopening సాధ్యమేనా ? వ్యాక్సిన్‌ వచ్చే వరకూ స్కూళ్లను మూసెయ్యాలి!

link.title: AP Schools Reopening సాధ్యమేనా ? వ్యాక్సిన్‌ వచ్చే వరకూ స్కూళ్లను మూసెయ్యాలి!

entry.content:
AP govt plans on reopening schools on september 5th, Meanwhile ap govt facing heat from parents and opposition on reopening of schools
#APSchoolsReopen
#coronavirus
#apgovernment
#students
#parentsonSchoolsReopen
#COVIDVaccine
#AdimulapuSuresh
#jaganannagorumudda
#onlineclases
#AndhraPradesh
#jaganannavidhyakanuka
#ఏపీ స్కూల్స్
ఏపీలో కరోనా ప్రభావం కొనసాగుతోంది. రాష్ట్రవ్యాప్తంగా రోజుకు దాదాపు 10 వేలకు పైగా కేసులు నమోదవుతున్నాయి. పిల్లలు ఇళ్లకే పరిమితమవుతున్నారు.. ఇలాంటి పరిస్ధితుల్లో సెప్టెంబర్‌ 5న విద్యాసంస్ధలు తిరిగి ప్రారంభించాలన్న ప్రభుత్వం నిర్ణయం తీసుకుంది.
entry.summary: AP govt plans on reopening schools on september 5th, Meanwhile ap govt facing heat from parents and opposition on reopening of schools #APSchoolsReopen #coronavirus #apgovernment #students #parentsonSchoolsReopen #COVIDVaccine #AdimulapuSuresh #jaganannagorumudda #onlineclases #AndhraPradesh #jaganannavidhyakanuka #ఏపీ స్కూల్స్ ఏపీలో కరోనా ప్రభావం కొనసాగుతోంది. రాష్ట్రవ్యాప్తంగా రోజుకు దాదాపు 10 వేలకు పైగా కేసులు నమోదవుతున్నాయి. పిల్లలు ఇళ్లకే పరిమితమవుతున్నారు.. ఇలాంటి పరిస్ధితుల్లో సెప్టెంబర్‌ 5న విద్యాసంస్ధలు తిరిగి ప్రారంభించాలన్న ప్రభుత్వం నిర్ణయం తీసుకుంది.
